title: gmelina lignum-vitreum
intro: Gmelina lignum-vitreum, also known as the Gmelina tree or Vitex trifolia, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gmelina lignum-vitreum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
